case_title: JOSHUA D HOWARD ET AL VS. MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JOSHUA D NICHOIS, KAYLEE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSHUA D. HOWARD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KAYLEE NICHOLIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA NAVAS, COMMUNITY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,892.62 FILED BY HOWARD, JOSHUA D NICHOIS, KAYLEE AS TO DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JOSHUA D NICHOIS, KAYLEE AS TO DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, CERTIFIED MAIL PICKED UP AT POST OFFICE AT MORRISON, NJ ON 01/29/19. SERVED JAN-29-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, JOSHUA D NICHOIS, KAYLEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MMP ASHTON OWNER, LLC. $1,592.62 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,657.62 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
